title: Thanks to MU and SNDK my annual income has doubled once again
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
It wasn t until late February a bit belatedly, perhaps that I realized the market's dominant theme had shifted to the upstream segments of the AI ​​supply chain: semiconductors and memory. Consequently, I swapped some of my GOOG holdings for MU and SNDK.

In March, when President Trump stirred things up and the Liberation Day rally pattern re emerged, I stood pat staying completely still, regardless of whether the market served up tacos or nachos.

I am currently sitting on a 150% unrealized gain. With no signs of a slowdown in AI capital expenditures, I plan to continue holding my positions.
